name: Golfing On Main Street
about: Golfing On Main Street is an indoor golf simulator venue providing a high-quality golf experience for players of all skill levels. They operate with a focus on helping golfers reach their maximum potential through a brand new indoor simulator. The facility offers private hourly golf sessions, accommodating groups of up to six golfers per simulator room. It takes an average of one hour for one golfer to complete a full 18 holes. The venue emphasizes convenience and accessibility, being open year-round and operating with extended hours.
why_golfers_like_it: Accommodates groups of up to 6 golfers per room
Allows for multiple bookings to extend play time
Focused on helping golfers reach their maximum potential
